## Working session summary

PR #2000 is ready for review: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/2000

Implemented:
- Added solve-side CPU/memory/full-filesystem resource markers at start, after clone, after AI execution, before exit, and around restart iterations.
- Added Docker completion disk fallback in the session monitor from final solve resource markers.
- Added outside-process resource telemetry to Telegram bot heartbeat logs.
- Added issue #1999 case study and captured evidence under `docs/case-studies/issue-1999/`.

Verified:
- `npm run lint`
- `npm test` after merging latest `origin/main`: all 296 selected test files passed
- GitHub Actions latest run for SHA `e7b1a2d5`: `Checks and release` completed successfully
- PR is no longer draft, mergeable, and the working tree is clean

References used in the case study/PR:
- Docker `inspect --size`: https://docs.docker.com/reference/cli/docker/inspect/
- Docker Engine API size fields: https://docs.docker.com/reference/api/engine/version/v1.43/
- Node `fs.statfsSync`: https://nodejs.org/api/fs.html

---
